scripts.dev:contentstack-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch contentstack --watch _shared --ext js,jsx,mjs --exec "node --import tsx contentstack/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:commercetools-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch commercetools --watch _shared --ext js,jsx,mjs --exec "node --import tsx commercetools/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:agility-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch agility --watch _shared --ext js,jsx,mjs --exec "node --import tsx agility/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:test-data-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch test-data --watch _shared --ext js,jsx,mjs --exec "node --import tsx test-data/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:contentstack-commercetools-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch contentstack-commercetools --watch _shared --ext js,jsx,mjs --exec "node --import tsx contentstack-commercetools/server/index.js"
